changes.reason: Multi-agent adapter implementation adds new CLI flags, env vars, auth method, and project structure changes not previously documented

changes.reason: New adapter layer sits between the task system and core infrastructure; the architecture overview needed a new layer section to document the AgentAdapter Protocol, ClaudeCodeAdapter, CodexCLIAdapter, and agent selection cascade

summary: Documented the multi-agent adapter architecture: AgentAdapter Protocol, ClaudeCodeAdapter and CodexCLIAdapter implementations, --agent CLI flag on all run commands, DKMV_AGENT and CODEX_API_KEY environment variables, Codex auth method in dkmv init, --codex-version on dkmv build, --start-task/--start-phase resume flags, adapters/ directory in project structure, and agent selection cascade in architecture overview.
